title: E-Side of YTPMV
description:
EDIT (17/10/2018):
You know, I think I've been stubborn with this long enough. Please just don't go off making money with this, that's mostly the one single worry that prevented me from releasing this any earlier :/
https://www.dropbox.com/s/j2brpc9wzwfg4sa/
https://www.mediafire.com/file/uq5hd63ij55yal4/

***

EDIT (13/7/2018):
Here are the split tracks:
https://www.dropbox.com/sh/ea29i4bn4nk4u1x/AADuk2Rcofeje5swESrlLEBSa?dl=0
https://www.mediafire.com/file/0fm3cmksok1w29j/

***

Yay, it's finally here, after all these years  :D
Sorry for the wait, all the collaborating kept me away from this for quite some time, but I did learn a thing or two while I was away. I hope you enjoy this  :3

#ytpmvmedley

***

DISCLAIMER: I am NOT monetizing this video, the ads are here due to this odd copyright ID claim:

Feel free to use AdBlocker or such
